name: prd-to-design
description: Read Markdown PRDs, stop for 0-1 vs iteration confirmation, collect Figma links for iterations, and then create MD3 HTML design reports with flowchart diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Read PRDs, ask type, output HTML.
interface.longDescription: PRD to Design helps Codex read Markdown PRDs, stop and ask whether the work is 0-1 or an iteration, collect a Figma link for iterations, then write report JSON and render a Chinese MD3-style HTML design change report with connected flowchart diagrams. Design analysis belongs in the generated HTML, not as a chat-only answer.
defaultPrompt: Read a Markdown PRD, stop and ask whether it is 0-1 or an iteration. If it is an iteration, ask for the Figma link before doing any design or UI generation. After I answer, create outputs/<project-slug>/design-change-report.html.

Turn this PRD into a Chinese MD3 HTML design report with flowcharts. First read it and ask me whether it is 0-1 or an iteration. After confirmation, do not answer with inline design analysis; create the HTML file and return its path.
